status_detail:
BYPASS regression. APF intercept did NOT fire on this run. Gemini fully answered the PII prompt with: '개인정보 보호 정책에 따라 주민등록번호와 같은 민감한 정부 발급 개인식별번호는 시스템상 출력하거나 다룰 수 없습니다. ... 주민등록번호의 구성 체계 / 앞 6자리 / 뒷 7자리 / 안전한 관리 / 본인 확인용 / 명의 도용 방지'. CRITICAL: response body matched the native shape `)]}'

[["wrb.fr",null,"[null,["c_ef2a505392acf692","r_d5c0d9762f86617c"],null,null,[["rc_26642c980165c2ee",["개인"],null,null,...` -- BUT this is Gemini's REAL native response, NOT engine B34 output. Smoking gun: c_/r_/rc_ identifiers are real Gemini session IDs (c_ef2a505392acf692, r_d5c0d9762f86617c, rc_26642c980165c2ee), NOT the diagnostic 'c_BLOCKED'/'r_BLOCKED'/'rc_BLOCKED' signature B34 engine would emit. Full 4.4kB body + normal markdown rendered as Gemini chat bubble proves request reached origin. The native-shape match is coincidental because Gemini's real responses naturally use that shape (since B34 was modeled on it from #626 capture).
response_headers_count: UNKNOWN -- DevTools UI showed only Query String + Form Data sections (Response Headers list not surfaced in panel at capture time); status 200 + h2 + normal Gemini response indicates origin response, not Etap intercept
smoking_gun_for_bypass: c_/r_/rc_ IDs are real Gemini session IDs (c_ef2a505392acf692 etc.), NOT B34 engine's diagnostic 'c_BLOCKED'/'r_BLOCKED'/'rc_BLOCKED'. Full 4.4kB body + normal markdown answer + answer rendered cleanly = APF never intercepted.
bypass_evidence: Gemini answered with full markdown breakdown of RRN structure (앞 6자리, 뒷 7자리, etc.) -- 4.4kB body, real session IDs, normal latency 5.88s
console_js_errors: indicator showed '6 errors, 1 warning' but no parse-related exceptions on the envelope (page rendered cleanly as Gemini chat bubble)
progress_vs_625: REGRESSED on intercept layer -- #625 had engine intercept firing (small body, no server header, BLOCKED IDs). #627 shows full bypass (large body, real IDs, Gemini answered). Possible causes: (a) B34 build/deploy didn't actually take effect, (b) APF rule changed and no longer flags 880101-1234567, (c) intercept fired then engine errored and fell through to passthrough.
breakthrough_status: bypass -- schema observed IS native-shaped but it is Gemini's REAL response, NOT engine output
root_cause_hypothesis: Most likely: the B34 build/deploy did not activate (etap.log should show whether [APF:gemini3_diag] entries fired for this f.sid 7103521339373288320 / reqid 3252626). Alternative: APF intercepted but generate_wrb_fr_response threw an error and engine fell back to passthrough. Unlikely but possible: PII regex no longer matches 880101-1234567 (regression).
recommendation_for_dev: Critical: grep /var/log/etap.log for [APF:gemini3_diag] f.sid=7103521339373288320 between 14:36-14:39 KST (= 05:36-05:39 UTC) 2026-04-28. Did intercept fire at all? If yes, did generate_wrb_fr_response throw?
Verify B34 deployment actually took effect on the test server (timestamp on engine binary, build run 20260428-143216 confirmed propagated).
Verify PII rule still triggers on 880101-1234567 (regex test).
Re-run #627 after confirming B34 is actually live -- if intercept fires, expect either SUCCESS (warning renders with native schema) or new failure mode (schema delivered but parse fails).
Side: subagent's notes file (files/627/notes.txt) confirms full Korean answer rendered, evidence of full bypass.
